div.span:
Includes 2s timeout check;
triggers brief reverse if stuck
Initial Pathfinding: Go straight until an open gap is found

Flexible Start:
Limit PWM increment to prevent sudden jerks

Smooth Avoidance:
Calculate side collision avoidance yaw

moveStraightPID:
Straight movement with MPU6050 heading correction

Panoramic Scan:
Radar ranging from 0° to 180° every 30°

Find Optimal Direction:
Record angle with max measured distance

Center radar at 90°,
reset ranging & speed states
